ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lands" (
  "land_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land plot */,
  "tran_coordinate" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the land plot (latitude, longitude) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group to which the land plot belongs */,
  "group_center" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the group center (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point1" TEXT /* Coordinates of the first reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point2" TEXT /* Coordinates of the second reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point3" TEXT /* Coordinates of the third reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point4" TEXT /* Coordinates of the fourth reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "group_center_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the group center (in meters) */,
  "refer_point1_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the first reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point2_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the second reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point3_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the third reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point4_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the fourth reference point (in meters) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version identifier for the land plot data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the land plot record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the land plot record was last updated */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the land survey */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for the land survey (e.g., GPS, manual measurement) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current use of the land (e.g., agricultural, residential) */,
  "land_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the land (e.g., fertile, barren) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, sand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lands_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the group is associated with */,
  "center_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the group center (latitude, longitude) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group record was last updated */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group (e.g., agricultural, residential) */,
  "group_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the group lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_group_lead FOREIGN KEY ("group_lead") REFERENCES group_leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference point */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference point */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference point record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference point record was last updated */,
  "point_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference point (e.g., control point, benchmark) */,
  "point_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the reference point coordinates (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the land plot data */,
  "land_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land plot */,
  "tran_coordinate" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the land plot (latitude, longitude) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group to which the land plot belongs */,
  "group_center" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the group center (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point1" TEXT /* Coordinates of the first reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point2" TEXT /* Coordinates of the second reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point3" TEXT /* Coordinates of the third reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "refer_point4" TEXT /* Coordinates of the fourth reference point (latitude, longitude) */,
  "group_center_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the group center (in meters) */,
  "refer_point1_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the first reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point2_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the second reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point3_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the third reference point (in meters) */,
  "refer_point4_DIST" REAL /* Distance from the land plot to the fourth reference point (in meters) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the land plot data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_versions_land_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_id") REFERENCES lands ("land_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, surveyor, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "land_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land plot accessed */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "access_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_land_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_id") REFERENCES lands ("land_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., land distribution, project summary) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project log */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group lead */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group lead record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group lead record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_leads_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_leads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
